vehicle.label: Tiltrotor VTOL Hybrid
vehicle.desc: Fixed-wing VTOL with 2 tilting rotor nacelles, BVLOS long-range capable

parts.label: Center Fuselage Spine
parts.spec: CFRP box beam center fuselage, avionics bay, wing spar socket, front GPS boom mount, belly camera window

parts.label: Main Wing (2-piece)
parts.spec: Straight wing, 4S NACA 2412, dual 15mm CFRP spar, 900mm half-span, 160mm chord, 3-layer CFRP skin

parts.label: Nacelle Assembly x 2
parts.spec: Tilting nacelle assembly, 0-90deg tilt axis, 6309 bearing set, servo-driven worm gear, motor and ESC pocket

parts.label: Tilt Servo + Linkage x 2
parts.spec: 25kg-cm DS3218 servo per nacelle, titanium pushrod, dual ball joints, tilt range 0-93deg, crash-tolerant

parts.label: V-Tail x 2 (Ruddervator)
parts.spec: +-35deg V-tail ruddervator pair, MG996R servo each, 30deg dihedral, CFRP sandwich panel, hinge piano wire

parts.label: Landing Gear (Tri)
parts.spec: Tricycle landing gear, spring-steel skid arms, 55mm dia wheels, CG at 1/3 chord, 200mm wheelbase

parts.label: Battery Bay (Slide-In)
parts.spec: Belly slide-in battery bay, 6S 8000mAh Li-ion pack, Velcro + strap dual retention, CG position 28% MAC

parts.label: Payload Nose Bay
parts.spec: Interchangeable nose payload bay, Day/IR camera gimbal or survey sensor, 80x60x50mm, 300g payload limit

parts.label: Tilt-Axis Harness + Datum Service Bay
parts.spec: Tiltrotor integration_service module with tilt-axis harness_channel, slack_loop, interface_datum, service_hatch, connector keying, and nacelle-to-wing load-path inspection access

risk.desc: Potential structural weakness at the wing spar socket.
risk.mit: Conduct FEA analysis to confirm structural integrity.

risk.desc: Thermal management in the avionics bay may be challenging.
risk.mit: Implement active cooling systems or optimize thermal insulation.

risk.desc: Service access to the avionics bay is limited.
risk.mit: Increase the size of the service access panel for better accessibility.

risk.desc: Potential misalignment issues with the GPS boom mount.
risk.mit: Review and adjust the mounting clearance to ensure proper alignment.

risk.desc: Camera window may be susceptible to environmental damage.
risk.mit: Use a protective cover or enhance the window material durability.

generated_parts.label: Tilt Servo + Linkage x 2

verify.rule: The blueprint must include all required sections and items as specified.
The mass_est_g must be a numeric value and within the expected range.
Each internal_feature_target must appear as a part_tree child and be referenced by at least 4 geometry_ops.
Adjacent interfaces must be named with exact neighboring subsystem labels and include connection_type, DOF, clearance_mm, and required_feature.
Critical joints need visible insert/washer/locking/preload evidence and torque_Nm or preload intent.
Boundary conditions must be defined for downstream CFD/FEA.

risk.desc: The design does not explicitly specify material grades for CFRP and Al, which could lead to inconsistent performance.
risk.mit: Specify material grades for CFRP and Al in the cad_brief.

risk.desc: The fastener torque values are placeholders and may not be accurate for the actual materials used.
risk.mit: Conduct a torque calibration test with the actual materials and update the cad_brief.

risk.desc: The thermal zones and pressure faces are not optimized for the actual operating conditions.
risk.mit: Review and adjust the thermal zones and pressure faces based on actual operating conditions.

risk.desc: The assembly sequence does not account for potential misalignment issues during installation.
risk.mit: Include alignment checks and adjustments in the assembly sequence.

risk.desc: The service access panel design may not provide sufficient clearance for maintenance tasks.
risk.mit: Review and adjust the service access panel design to ensure adequate clearance for maintenance.

verify.rule: All required elements are present in the blueprint.

risk.desc: Potential thermal issues due to high ambient temperatures (-20 to +50C).
risk.mit: Implement advanced cooling solutions such as active cooling systems or enhanced passive cooling designs.

risk.desc: Risk of water ingress due to outdoor flight in rain/dust/salt environments.
risk.mit: Ensure all openings and interfaces are sealed with appropriate gaskets and seals.

risk.desc: Risk of mechanical failure due to high loads (3g maneuvering).
risk.mit: Conduct stress analysis and ensure all critical components have sufficient safety factors.

risk.desc: Risk of incorrect assembly due to complex assembly sequence.
risk.mit: Provide detailed assembly instructions and training for assembly personnel.

risk.desc: Risk of electrical issues due to connector mis-mating.
risk.mit: Ensure all connectors are properly labeled and keyed to prevent mis-mating.
